SBCMC Booth Layout Planner Hunter Street campus — five levels. Drag boxes to plan booth placement; sizes are proportional to each map's own confirmed scale (see note under the map).

Drag a box to move it, or double-click it to type a name (a vendor, a sponsor, anything) right on the box \u2014 it replaces the package letter and saves with the layout. Hover it to reveal handles: the top knob drags to rotate freely (snaps to 15° steps, hold Shift for exact free angles); the dark ↻ badge jumps a quick 90°; the red × removes it. Each package's counter shows how many you've placed so far, added up across every map.
Ad-hoc labels
Drops a text tag on the current map. Double-click it to type anything — a room name, a note, an arrow callout. Drag to reposition; hover for the × to remove.
Checking shared sync\u2026
Version History
No versions saved yet \u2014 click "Save Version" to create one.
Everything autosaves live to the shared database as you go \u2014 that's what everyone sees, always current. "Save Version" freezes a snapshot in that same database you can always come back to, even if something gets deleted later.
